title: A Simple Donuts Mod
description: A very simple mod that adds two different types of donuts, Chocolate and Regular.
body:
A very simple mod for donuts.

This mod is very simple, only dding two things: a Donut, and a Chocolate Donut. Both are craftable in survival.

This mod makes for a great addition to any slightly modded worlds you may have.

The Donut gives 5 Hunger Points, and 0.3 Saturation.
The Chocolate Donut gives 6 Hunger Points, and 0.6 saturation, however, it it harder to craft, with a cocoa bean in the center.
